---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Astera
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature or enhancement you'd like.

## Problem

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What is the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
